title: Minuartia sibirica
taxonomy: Minuartia sibirica belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae, which includes a wide range of succulent plants. This classification places Minuartia sibirica within the order Caryophyllales. It is a member of the genus Minuartia, which includes various species of small, flowering plants. Minuartia sibirica is a type of moss saxifrage native to certain regions of the world. It is often characterized by its small, white flowers and short, hairy stems.
